title: The Core Data Structures of Pandas
description: A flowchart illustrating the hierarchical relationship between the core data structures in pandas (Series and DataFrame) and their connection to NumPy's ndarray, forming the foundation of data manipulation in Python.
relationships: Series is built upon/contains an ndarray
DataFrame is a collection of Series objects
Both Series and DataFrame provide enhanced data handling capabilities (indexing, labeling, handling missing data) not found in bare ndarrays
